roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONTD:DISMISSAL, TRAILING SENTENCING IN #21002893/DOP/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPSDEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ONTHE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:THE DEFENDANTIS ONLY TO BE RELEASED TO A STAFF MEMBER OF THE  JERICHO  PROGRAM/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/INTC/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/X: CONFLICT COUNSEL WAS PREVIOUSLY APPOINTED,/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:05-07-21 (30TH), 05-24-21 (60TH)/987,2/BAIL: 10000/CTORD: WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING IN DEPARTMENT 20/DOP/
/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/DAWT/X: COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT REQUESTS CONTINUANCE SO HEMAY TALK TO HIS  CLIENT WITH THE AID OF A SPANISH LANGUAGE INTERPRETER PRIOR TO ARRAIGNMENT,/CONT/CAUSE

/CAL  ARRAIGNMENT/DAWT/TEXT CONFL CNSL APPTD/CON  NEIL HALLINAN/X    COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT REQUESTS CONTINUANCE SO HE MAY TALK TO HIS  CLIENT WITHTHE AID OF A SPANISH LANGUAGE INTERPRETER PRIOR TO ARRAIGNMENT,/CONT/CAUSE/BAIL: 10000/CTORD: WITHOUT PREJUDICE/
/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/X:COURT NOTES DEFENDANT REMANDED ON 9-15-21/X:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT DISCHARGED,/X:FUTURE HEARING DATE CONFIRMED,/
